title: Trace replay receives transaction hash context

title: LLM error responses use constant fee

summary: LLM error constant fee lacks trace fallback metadata.
title: LLM error responses use constant fee

summary: FHE storage fields are decoded as StorageRef tuples.

title: DA error deliveries settle with constant fee

title: Error settlement fees are bounded at compile time

summary: LLM has_error responses settle with the constant fee.
title: LLM has_error settles with constant fee

summary: LLM has_error decode preserves the prefixed executor message.
title: LLM has-error decode preserves prefixed executor message

summary: Plaintext fallback LLM errors settle with the constant fee.
title: Plaintext LLM errors settle with constant fee

summary: LLM has_error responses settle with the constant executor fee.
title: LLM error responses settle with constant executor fee

summary: Block verifier uses the shared SPC allowlist.
title: Block verifier uses shared SPC allowlist

title: FHE precompile requires FHE executor capability

summary: Direct SPC verification uses the shared allowlist.
title: Direct SPC verification uses the shared allowlist

title: All two-phase precompiles escrow callback cost

summary: Malformed delivery config rejects escrow validation.
title: Malformed delivery config rejects escrow validation

summary: JQ worker availability is enforced at node startup.
title: JQ worker required at startup

summary: Agent registry capabilities remain separate from executor capabilities.
title: Agent registry capabilities are not executor capabilities

summary: Heartbeat revival uses prepared payloads but not the required reviveAgentPrepared ABI.
title: Heartbeat revival uses prepared payloads

summary: Prepared revival requires an eligible executor and no pending job.
title: Prepared revival requires eligible executor and no pending job

summary: Node startup requires the JQ worker binary.
title: Node startup requires JQ worker

summary: Revival executor selection is not block-number modulo based.
title: Revival executor selection avoids last executor

title: Revival executor selection uses parent hash

title: Revival executor avoids last executor when possible

summary: Revival executor selection is agent-specific and deterministic.
title: Revival executor selection is agent-specific and deterministic
